Text:
We are open. Come on in.

Walk-up tickets are available at the door, no need to book in advance. Everyone is welcome.

If you are not drinking, you do not pay to come in. Free entry for under-18s, non-drinkers and designated drivers, so bring the family along. The marquee is dry, comfortable and stocked with around 200 real ales, ciders, perries and meads.

Open until 11pm tonight. See you in there.

https://hitchinbeerciderfestival.org.uk/
or visit the link in our bio.

4th to 6th June 2026
King George V Playing Fields, Old Hale Way, Hitchin, SG5 1XL

#HitchinBeerFestival #HBCF2026 #RealAle #RealCider #CAMRA #Hitchin #NorthHerts #Hertfordshire #SupportLocal #CommunityEvent #FamilyFriendly

In partnership with CAMRA North Hertfordshire and Hitchin Rugby Club.
Alt text(s): Pink graphic with 'WE ARE OPEN' in large Bebas typography at the top, the pink Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival hedgehog logo in the centre, 'COME ON IN' below, and 'Hitchin Beer & Cider Festival 2026' at the bottom
